hero.headline: Your AI workforce, ready to work
hero.subheadline: Create AI agents that sell, support, and grow your business — on WebChat and WhatsApp. Set up in minutes, not months.

features.title: Everything your agents need
features.subtitle: From first conversation to closed deal — your AI agents handle it all.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.description: Deploy agents with custom personalities, goals, and knowledge. They learn from every conversation.

channels.title: Multi-Channel
channels.description: WebChat widget for your site and WhatsApp integration. Meet your customers where they already are.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Feed your agents docs, URLs, and policies. They retrieve the right info at the right moment.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Track conversations, resolutions, costs, and performance. Know exactly what your agents are doing.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start small, scale when you're ready. No hidden fees.

profile.title: Public Profile
profile.description: Customize what visitors see on your public chat page.
profile.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF. Max 2 MB.
profile.avatarTypeError: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Everything you need to get the most out of Camello.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Add your business name, tagline, and avatar so customers know who they're chatting with.
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Copy your public chat link from the Profile page and share it with customers.
gettingStarted.step3Desc: Check the Overview page to see what customers are asking and how your agent is performing.

shareLink.title: Share Your Chat Link
shareLink.intro: Your public chat page is a mobile-friendly page where anyone can talk to your AI agent. Here are some ways to share it:
shareLink.tip1: Add it to your Instagram or TikTok bio as a link.
shareLink.tip2: Include it in your Linktree or link-in-bio page.
shareLink.tip3: Download the QR code from your Profile page and print it on business cards or flyers.

dashboardGuide.title: Understanding Your Dashboard
dashboardGuide.intro: Here's a quick overview of each section in your dashboard:
dashboardGuide.overviewA: Your home base. See conversation stats, plan usage, what customers are asking, and your public chat link at a glance.
dashboardGuide.conversationsA: Browse all conversations your AI agent has had. Click into any conversation to read the full message history.
dashboardGuide.agentsA: Manage your AI agents. Activate agent types (Sales, Support, Marketing, Custom), configure their personality, greeting, and quick action buttons.
dashboardGuide.knowledgeA: Feed your agent information. Add documents, URLs, or paste text. The agent uses this to give accurate, relevant answers.
dashboardGuide.analyticsA: Deep dive into performance: conversation trends, LLM costs, per-agent metrics, and billing period usage.
dashboardGuide.billingA: View your current plan, upgrade or downgrade, cancel your subscription, and see billing history.
dashboardGuide.profileA: Customize your public chat page: business card, avatar, social links, and QR code. Also set your preferred language.

knowledgeTips.title: Knowledge Base Tips
knowledgeTips.intro: The better your knowledge base, the smarter your agent. Here are some tips:
knowledgeTips.tip1: Keep entries focused — one topic per entry works better than long documents.
knowledgeTips.tip2: Include FAQs, pricing info, return policies, and business hours.
knowledgeTips.tip3: Use the website import to automatically scrape content from your site.
knowledgeTips.tip4: Review learnings regularly — your agent picks up patterns from conversations and you can boost or dismiss them.
